channel.title: Base32 on Today I Learned
channel.description: Recent content in Base32 on Today I Learned

item.description: That there are two versions of the base32 encoding per RFC 4648: preferred base32 (A-Z 2-7), and base32hex (0-9 A-V =). See https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Base32#Base_32_Encoding_with_Extended_Hex_Alphabet_per_%C2%A77
